hooks.command: file_path=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>&1 || true; fi

file_path=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|mjs)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx oxlint "$file_path" 2>&1 || true; fi
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx prettier --check . 2>&1 && npx oxlint 2>&1; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'Lint/format errors found — fix before committing.' >&2; exit 2; fi
